articles.description: Follow Wednesday's Premier League action including Aston Villa v Chelsea, Brighton & Hove Albion v Arsenal, Fulham v West Ham, Manchester City v Nottingham Forest and Newcastle v Man Utd.
articles.title: Premier League LIVE: Aston Villa vs Chelsea, Brighton vs Arsenal, Fulham vs West Ham, Man City vs Nottingham Forest & Newcastle vs Man Utd scores & updates

articles.description: Bukayo Saka's early goal gives Arsenal victory at Brighton to extend their lead to seven points at the top of the Premier League.
articles.title: Brighton 0-1 Arsenal: Arsenal move seven points clear of Man City

articles.description: Title-chasing Manchester City stumble at home by being held to draw by relegation-threatened Nottingham Forest to fall seven points adrift of Premier League leaders Arsenal.
articles.title: Man City stumble as Forest claim unlikely draw

articles.description: Sports Editor Dan Roan analyses Russia's controversial return to global sporting action at the Winter Paralympics and what it might mean for other sports.
articles.title: Winter Paralympics: Watershed moment as Russia's sporting exile ends

articles.description: Substitute William Osula scores a superb late winner as 10-man Newcastle United inflict Michael Carrick's first defeat as Manchester United manager.
articles.title: Newcastle United 2-1 Manchester United: Newcastle see off Man Utd with late Osula strike

articles.description: Listen to Sportsound and follow live text commentary, score updates and match report from Aberdeen vs Celtic in the Scottish Premiership.
articles.title: Aberdeen vs Celtic: Scottish Premiership radio commentary, text updates & match report

articles.description: England, Harry Brook and Brendon McCullum need Jos Buttler now as much as ever as they face reigning champions India in the T20 World Cup semi-final.
articles.title: T20 Cricket World Cup, India vs England: Harry Brook and Brendon McCullum need prime Jos Buttler in seismic semi-final

articles.description: Rory McIlroy says that Luke Donald's return for a third Ryder Cup as Europe's captain is a "huge advantage", and speaks on Jon Rahm's eligibility for 2027.
articles.title: Ryder Cup: Luke Donald return 'wonderful' for Europe - Rory McIlroy

articles.description: Manchester United defender Harry Maguire has his suspended sentence reduced to 15 months at a retrial following an incident in Greece in 2020.
articles.title: Harry Maguire: Man Utd defender given 15-month suspended sentence over Greece incident

articles.description: Joao Pedro's hat-trick breathes fresh life into Chelsea's Champions League charge with a statement win at rivals Aston Villa.
articles.title: Aston Villa 1-4 Chelsea: Joao Pedro hat-trick sends Champions League message
